purpose: Developer source-of-truth for Area 01 blockout lanes, solid terrain, collision visibility, resource pockets, and reachability rules. This is not an in-game minimap or an exact player locator.

coordinate_space.camera_intent: Side-view dive map with surface entry above, wider exploration left/right, and deeper routes below.
coordinate_space.note: Coordinates are approximate planning anchors. Scene node paths are authoritative for current implementation checks.

map_pipeline.rule: Foreground playable terrain is built from source-map polygons. Parallax, lighting, plants, crystals, cave glows, pickups, and scan affordances are separate non-colliding visuals unless explicitly listed as triggers or pickups.

terrain_chunk_library.role: Large reef boundary or ceiling/floor mass.
terrain_chunk_library.visual_strategy: single filled Polygon2D using the approved reef texture, continuous internal planes, readable edge bands, and sparse decals
terrain_chunk_library.collision_strategy: one simplified CollisionPolygon2D using the same source-map polygon
terrain_chunk_library.repeat_policy: reuse the visual treatment per polygon; do not stamp isolated rectangular wall sprites across the mass

terrain_chunk_library.role: Shelf edge, floor, or overhang that frames a playable water lane.
terrain_chunk_library.visual_strategy: same filled source-map polygon plus stronger top or underside edge band
terrain_chunk_library.collision_strategy: same source-map polygon, simplified enough for CharacterBody2D movement
terrain_chunk_library.repeat_policy: extend by source-map polygon points, not by generating one image per ledge

terrain_chunk_library.role: Readable opening, quiet future seal, or non-colliding route affordance.
terrain_chunk_library.visual_strategy: separate scene object under GameplayObjects; no player-blocking collision unless promoted to solid terrain first
terrain_chunk_library.collision_strategy: none by default; triggers use Area2D and must not masquerade as solid terrain

terrain_chunk_library.role: Plants, crystals, background rock, light shafts, and parallax depth.
terrain_chunk_library.visual_strategy: separate non-colliding visuals behind or in front of terrain
terrain_chunk_library.repeat_policy: may repeat freely as dressing only if opacity stays below terrain and cargo readability

known_playtest_defects.player_report: Player can swim into a wall-looking right terrain mass.
known_playtest_defects.must_resolve_by: Every solid-looking wall must either have matching collision and lip visuals or be clearly marked as nonblocking background in this map.

known_playtest_defects.player_report: Player gets stopped by nothing when trying to move left.
known_playtest_defects.must_resolve_by: Every enabled blocking collision must have a visible solid terrain mass and visible rim or lip before contact.

known_playtest_defects.player_report: Several scannable or interactable objects appear to sit behind terrain or outside reachable lanes.
known_playtest_defects.must_resolve_by: Current-run scannables and pickups must sit in playable lanes or be explicitly authored as quiet future-locked promises.

playable_water_lanes.role: Primary vertical descent spine from surface toward the first deeper decision space.
Wider left-side chamber that should feel like explorable map, not a tiny pocket.
Early right-side shelf route with room to approach resource pockets.
Right-side chamber route for starter material spread and future cave-mouth affordances.
Lower central basin that hints at deeper route progression without becoming exact-route guidance.
Leftward exploration chamber that makes Area 01 feel wider than one starter pocket.
Open-water crossing between starter shelves and the farther right chamber.
Far-right chamber approach that should be reachable at normal camera scale.
Deeper continuation spine that gives Area 01 a visible downward next-run hypothesis.

solid_terrain.role: First left shelf terrain under the surface entry.
First right shelf terrain under the surface entry.
Large right-side blockout mass that should frame a reachable lane, not hide a blocker.
Left-side shelf framing a future cave pocket.
Top boundary for the left chamber lane.
Right chamber shelf and upper lane boundary.
Far-west terrain boundary that frames a second leftward chamber.
Mid-map ceiling mass that frames an open crossing toward the far-right chamber.
Deep spine floor mass that frames the downward continuation.
Far-right wall mass that gives the right chamber a readable boundary.

nonblocking_background_policy.rule: These upper-water shapes must stay nonblocking until redesigned as visible terrain.
BackgroundFar, BackgroundMid, OceanParallaxBackground, and lighting polygons must never own collision or imply hard blockers.

resource_pockets.current_role: First shallow food, water, driftwood, and kelp teaching pocket.
Left cave material promise without exact route locator behavior.

cave_mouth_affordances.role: Readable left-side opening near the starter cave/material pocket without exact route-locator behavior.
Readable right-side chamber entrance that distinguishes open water from solid reef edge.
Quiet future-depth promise that should read as lower priority than current reachable openings.

scannable_and_interactable_policy.current_run_targets: Must be reachable from a playable water lane and visually separated from solid terrain.
scannable_and_interactable_policy.future_locked_promises: May sit beyond visible blockers only if marked as locked/future and rendered quieter than current goals.
scannable_and_interactable_policy.labels: Labels confirm interaction state; they must not be the only way to understand reachability.
scannable_and_interactable_policy.no_exact_locator: Do not add exact map markers, checklists, or route arrows that remove exploration mystery.

validation_rules.rule: Every enabled CollisionPolygon2D blocker in Area01ArtSlice/TerrainCollision must have a mapped visible Polygon2D solid and a mapped Polygon2D rim/lip.
Any opaque terrain-looking Polygon2D must either be mapped as solid terrain or listed as nonblocking background/decor.
Playable water lanes are planned as open movement spaces; collision should frame their edges, not cross their centers.
Current pickups, scan targets, and interactables must be reachable from a playable lane unless intentionally marked as future-locked.
Background, lighting, parallax, and dressing shapes may not own player-blocking collision.

Foreground playable terrain must use the source-map terrain chunk library: filled terrain polygons, simplified matching collision, continuous edge treatment, and no rectangular sprite stamping as the primary wall read.
Scannable targets must be reachable and nonblocking in the current run, or visually quiet and explicitly locked as future content.
Starter pockets should be spread across left, right, and deeper lanes so resources teach the room layout instead of clustering in one tiny area.
Cave mouths should distinguish openings from solid terrain without adding exact arrows, checklist markers, minimap behavior, or label-only comprehension.

next_implementation_order: Validate the expanded Area 01 blockout from normal play before resuming #675 and #677.
Keep #676 and #678 deferred until Area 01 has enough footprint for honest ambience and screenshot-comparison work.
non_goals: No new route content, creatures, upgrades, resources, or promises.
No in-game minimap or exact locator behavior.
No broad procedural generation system in this pass.
